name: Adult Universal Foundation
description: Cross-program adult universal foundation measure set used as a common core across CMS quality programs.

name: Medicare Shared Savings Program
description: Accountable Care Organizations report quality through the APP Plus measure set under MSSP.

name: Quality Payment Program — APM Performance Pathway
description: MIPS APM reporting framework using a streamlined fixed measure set.

name: Merit-based Incentive Payment System
description: Eligible clinician program scoring quality, cost, improvement activities, and Promoting Interoperability.

name: Hospital Inpatient Quality Reporting
description: Hospital quality measures including obstetric complications and severe maternal morbidity.

name: Hospital Outpatient Quality Reporting
description: Outpatient hospital quality reporting program for ED, imaging, and procedural care.

name: Ambulatory Surgical Center Quality Reporting
description: Quality reporting program for Medicare-certified ambulatory surgery centers.

name: Inpatient Psychiatric Facility Quality Reporting
description: Quality reporting for inpatient psychiatric facilities.

name: ESRD Quality Incentive Program
description: Pay-for-performance program for outpatient dialysis facilities.

name: PPS-Exempt Cancer Hospital Quality Reporting
description: Quality reporting program for PPS-exempt cancer hospitals.

name: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility Quality Reporting
description: Quality reporting program for inpatient rehabilitation facilities.

name: ORYX Hospital Performance Measurement
description: Joint Commission's accreditation-required performance measurement program for hospitals.

name: Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set
description: NCQA's measure set used by health plans for quality reporting and accreditation.
